# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Discarded because the source excerpt does not clearly show institute-worthy empirical or operational substance.

## Why

The excerpt presents an architecture and workflow case study about multi-agent coding and review, with some implementation-description details such as file count, line count, and test count, but it does not show concrete benchmark results, measured performance outcomes, production telemetry, incident evidence, or a serious paper/preprint artifact. The visible material is primarily explanatory and promotional about the workflow rather than evidentiary in the institute sense.

## Limits
